name: ontograph-editor-root
description: Unified ontology and terminology engineering environment for VS Code

scripts.setup: npm install && (cd apps/OntoGraph-lite && npm install) && (cd apps/authoring-ui-vscode && npm install --legacy-peer-deps)
scripts.build-all: npm run validate-submodules && npm run build:client && npm run build:graph && npm run build:extension
scripts.package:vsix: npm run validate-submodules && npm run build:client && npm run build:graph && (cd extension && npx vsce package --out dist/)
